message:
fix(mail-ui,messaging): numeric thread reference resolution for root messages and O(1) subject length check

mail_ui.rs:
- Add display_thread_ref_for_message() which resolves thread references
  for messages that are conversation roots (no explicit thread_id) by
  checking if any replies reference the message's numeric ID
- Extract explicit_thread_ref() helper for consistent empty/whitespace
  filtering of stored thread IDs
- Update UnifiedMessageAggregate::from_inbox_row() to accept Cx+pool
  and return Result for fallible thread resolution
- Update render_inbox() and collect_unified_message_aggregates() to
  use the new thread resolution, replacing the old approach that left
  root messages with empty thread references
- 2 new tests: inbox root seed and unified aggregation both verify
  numeric thread references are correctly resolved

messaging.rs:
- Replace chars().count() > 200 with chars().nth(200).is_some() for
  O(1) short-circuit subject length checking (avoids counting all
  chars when most subjects are well under 200)
- Apply same optimization in send_message, reply_to_message, and
  test helper truncate_subject

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
